/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libproject_one__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libproject_one__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/project_one__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/project_one/srv/odd_even_check__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/justiny/ros2_course_project_one/build/project_one:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libproject_one__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
